'''√dh-zh-v''' ('''kadhazhav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicksave|quicksave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicksave|quicksave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-zh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazhav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhazhav || jidhazhav || shidhazhav || kidhazhav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhazhav || jujudhazhav || shushudhazhav || kukudhazhav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhazhav || judhazhav || shudhazhav || kudhazhav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhazhav || judhazhav || shudhazhav || kudhazhav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhazhav || jedhazhav || shedhazhav || kedhazhav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhazhav || jojodhazhav || shoshodhazhav || kokodhazhav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhazhav || jodhazhav || shodhazhav || kodhazhav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhazhav || jodhazhav || shodhazhav || kodhazhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav || dhazhav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhazhav || jædhazhav || shædhazhav || kædhazhav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhazhav || jajadhazhav || shashadhazhav || kakadhazhav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhazhav || jadhazhav || shadhazhav || kadhazhav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhazhav || jadhazhav || shadhazhav || kadhazhav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhazhav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhazhav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhazhav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhazhavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhazhavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhazhavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhazhavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhazhavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhazhavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhazhavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhazhavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhazhavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhazhavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhazhavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhazhavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhazhavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhazhavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhazhavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhazhavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhazhavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhazhavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhazhavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhazhavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhazhavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhazhavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhazhavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhazhavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhazhavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhazhavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhazhavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhazhavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhazhavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhazhavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhazhavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhazhavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhazhavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhazhavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhazhavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhazhavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhazhavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhazhavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhazhavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhazhavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhazhavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhazhavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhazhavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhazhavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhazhavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhazhavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhazhavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhazhavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhazhavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhazhavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhazhavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhazhavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhazhavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhazhavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhazhavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhazhavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhazhavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhazhavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhazhavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhazhavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
